visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a black dress with a keyhole neckline, stands in a Costco freezer aisle. She holds up a large gold hoop earring with pearls and a small gold book charm. (2) Close-up view shows her hands opening the tiny gold book charm on her earring, revealing the words inside. (3) The woman gestures towards the freezer shelves. The camera cuts to a large yellow package of quail eggs on a shelf. (4) Close-up shots display the packaging details: a yellow outer bag and individual vacuum-sealed transparent packs containing dark brown quail eggs. (5) Back to the woman in the aisle; she gives a thumbs-up and points at the shelf, then picks up a package. (6) Scene shifts to an indoor home setting where two women sit at a table. One has dark hair with red accents and a blue beret; the other is the woman from the store. (7) They hold the quail egg packaging and vacuum packs, showing them to the camera. (8) They display a skewer with three quail eggs on it and continue to interact with the vacuum-sealed bags on the table.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 給大家看. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Subtitle]: 有人要看我的書嗎. (3) [Subtitle]: 好他書是可以打開的哦. (4) [Subtitle]: 裡面寫. (5) [Variety]: 爛透了. (6) [Subtitle]: 好你要買什麼呢. (7) [Slogan]: 熱賣新品. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (8) [Subtitle]: 鰹魚風味鵪鶉蛋. (9) [Subtitle]: 它 265元的鵪鶉蛋哎. (10) [Logo]: 福記. (11) [Subtitle]: 可是它有225克乘以三包. (12) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (13) [Subtitle]: 所以大概有725克. (14) [Subtitle]: 而且是拆封即食. (15) [Subtitle]: 所以很好去試吃. (16) [Subtitle]: 來我們來試吃. (17) [Subtitle]: 告訴大家值不值得. (18) [Subtitle]: 好帶回家吃. (19) [Variety]: GO~. (20) [Subtitle]: 聞不到啦它是冷凍的. (21) [Slogan]: 福記 鰹魚風味鵪鶉蛋. (22) [Subtitle]: 一顆是3.3塊. (23) [Subtitle]: 所以加一串3小顆是10塊錢. (24) [Subtitle]: 然後它每一顆蛋呢都非常完整. (25) [Subtitle]: 就是它是放在這種真空袋子. (26) [Subtitle]: 你直接剝開來就有26顆. (27) [Subtitle]: 可以馬上吃的那一種. (28) [Subtitle]: 完全不用調味. (29) [Subtitle]: 也不能微波加熱. (30) [Subtitle]: 吃起來呢就是那種偏甜甜的鵪鶉蛋. (31) [Subtitle]: 所以如果你喜歡那種偏甜的滷蛋的話. (32) [Subtitle]: 非常適合你喲. (33) [Subtitle]: 喜歡所長茶葉蛋的人一定會喜歡. (34) [Subtitle]: 沒有錯雖然它價格沒有到很便宜. (35) [Subtitle]: 但是它每一顆的品相都是. (36) [Subtitle]: 還不錯所以. (37) [Subtitle]: 如果你夏天也想要有一個鵪鶉蛋小菜的話. (38) [Subtitle]: 可以買放在家裡就不用自己滷了. (39) [Subtitle]: 很方便.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two female hosts are seen together in the latter half of the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black dress with a neck cutout and large pearl earrings. The second woman has dark hair with red-dyed sections and wears a blue beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between a warehouse store freezer aisle with glass doors and a domestic indoor living area with a table and shelves.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking with high energy and a friendly, upbeat tone. An electronic pop BGM track plays in the background at a steady 120 BPM tempo. (2) A mechanical 'click' and a subsequent 'ding' sound effect occur as the speaker opens a piece of jewelry. The music continues without interruption. (3) A 'whoosh' transition sound effect marks a shift in the visual scene. The speaker's voice is joined by a second female speaker, resulting in a lively conversational exchange with high vocal arousal. (4) Distinct plastic rustling sounds are heard as packaging is handled. The background music remains upbeat and prominent but stays below the level of the primary speech. (5) The video concludes with the voices laughing and several 'pop' and 'cartoon' sound effects used for comedic timing and emphasis before the track ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Context Setting -> Value Proposition -> Review -> Endorsement
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This is a consumer-focused product review aimed at social media audiences. It uses a quirky opening hook (jewelry) to grab attention before transitioning into a detailed breakdown of a Costco food product. The creators evaluate the quantity, cost-per-unit, and flavor of the 'Fuche' brand quail eggs to provide a helpful recommendation for viewers looking for convenient snacks or side dishes.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video provides specific brand naming, price breakdown, and a clear recommendation based on taste test performance.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes short-form video tropes like the 'curiosity hook' and high-density subtitles to maintain viewer engagement during a product review.
